inherit_from: [‘plot’]

Keywords¶

archive_type¶

default: None

attribute value
optional True
unique True

colorbar_title¶

default: None

A string specifying the text template to use for the title of the colormap

attribute value
lowercase False
optional True
unique True

comment¶

default: “”

A directive specifying special annotations on the plot (commentline, commenttext)

attribute value
alias annotate
  decorator

contour¶

default: None

attribute value
optional True

curve¶

default: “”

A list of directives of type line, bar, dot etc...

attribute value
alias curves
type curve

datahook¶

default: None

This is a callable which is called for each set of data retrieved / computed during the production of the plot. This is particularly handy for printing out values etc... A standard datahook is provided, it is called printhook

attribute value
optional True
unique True

fields¶

default: None

attribute value
alias field

file_tmpl¶

default: None

attribute value
lowercase False
optional True
unique True

geography¶

default: None

attribute value
optional True
unique True

graphics¶

default: “”

A directive specifying graphics attributes for the plot, these are inherited by curves

attribute value
type graphics
unique True

has_legend¶

default: True

Switches the display of the legend on and off

attribute value
unique True

has_title¶

default: True

Switches the display of the plot title on and off

attribute value
unique True

has_xtitle¶

default: False

Switches the display of the X axis title on and off

attribute value
unique True

has_ytitle¶

default: False

Switches the display of the Y axis title on and off

attribute value
unique True

ignore_missing_files¶

default: False

When accessing files, if a file is missing, the application can either fail and report the error, or ignore the problem and carry on

attribute value
alias ignore_missing
unique True

interactive¶

default: True

attribute value
optional True
unique True

layout¶

default: 1, 1

attribute value
optional True

legend¶

default: “”

A string specifying the text template to use for the legend

attribute value
type plotlegend
unique True

output_file¶

default: <parameter>_<date>_<step>_<level>.png

attribute value
optional True
unique True

plotdata¶

default: None

A directive specifying meta data for the type of data being plotted (obssdate, odsdata, scoredata, etc...)

attribute value
optional True
unique True

root_tmpl¶

default: None

attribute value
lowercase False
optional True
unique True

slices¶

default: None

attribute value
alias slice

sort¶

default: None

This option is useful when plotting bars. Sometimes we want the bars to be sorted to have increasing or decreasing bars in size and value. The special value None means no sorting.

attribute value
unique True
validate ValidateChoice
  None
  increasing
  decreasing
  rank_increasing
  rank_decreasing

staging_rate¶

default: hourly

attribute value
lowercase False
unique True

title¶

default: None

This is a list of strings making the plot title. Each element of the list represents one different line. Plots have default templates for the title, if you would like to only override one line of the title and keep the other lines as the default definition, specify None for the lines which should have the default template.

attribute value
lowercase False
optional True

title_font¶

default: “”

A plotfont directive defining different parameters for the font to use for the title

attribute value
type plotfont
unique True

tree_tmpl¶

default: None

attribute value
lowercase False
optional True
unique True

xaxis¶

default: “”

A directive specifying the characteristics of the X axis

attribute value
alias x_axis
type axis
unique True

xtitle¶

default: None

A string specifying the text template to use for the title along the X axis.

attribute value
lowercase False
optional True
unique True

yaxis¶

default: “”

A directive specifying the characteristics of the Y axis

attribute value
alias y_axis
type axis
unique True

ytitle¶

default: None

A string specifying the text template to use for the title along the Y axis.

attribute value
lowercase False
optional True
unique True
